install.name: Art CSS Dock
install.author: artetics.com
install.description:
Art CSS Dock - Mac OS X style icon dock.

© Artetics.com - Start Point For Your Website.

param.name: icons
param.label: Icons
param.description: Icons. One icon on each line

param.name: titles
param.label: Titles
param.description: Titles. One title on each line

param.name: links
param.label: Links
param.description: Links. One link on each line

param.name: hoverWidth
param.label: Icon hover width
param.description: Default icon width on mouse over

field.name: icons
field.label: Icons
field.description: Icons. One icon on each line

field.name: titles
field.label: Titles
field.description: Titles. One title on each line

field.name: links
field.label: Links
field.description: Links. One link on each line

field.name: hoverWidth
field.label: Icon hover width
field.description: Default icon width on mouse over
